payments.note: From order exports (Jul-Dec 2025). Easebuzz/Gokwik settlements pending.

geography.note: Based on 1,950 orders from Jul-Dec 2025 order exports

insights: FIRST15 is the dominant discount — used on 2124 orders (54.8% of all orders), generating ₹112.3L gross sales
Total discount leakage: ₹49.7L (20.5% of gross sales)
LINEN25 (25% off) used on 265 orders — second highest, drives premium product sales

fy24_pl.note: From StanEdition-_-PnL-FY24-25.xlsx. Revenue = ₹0 (not filled). This was the pre-launch / early-launch phase.
insights: Pre-launch phase: Apr-Sep '24 was product development (₹5.2L production + ₹2.2L video)
Meta Ads started Oct '24, ramped from ₹11.5K to ₹1.9L/month by Mar '25
FY24-25 was entirely investment phase — zero revenue recorded
Total burn: ₹13.2L before first sales in FY25-26

intelligence.note: Cross-functional analysis based on available data. Some metrics are estimates pending marketing + shipping data.

funnel.note: Shipping costs and COGS pending — true profitability cannot be calculated yet

cod_risk.note: 31.6% pure COD + 14.3% partial COD = 45.9% COD exposure. High RTO risk.

discount_dependency.alert: 54.7% of orders use FIRST15 — heavy first-order discount dependency

product_concentration.alert: Top 3 products = 31.8% of revenue — moderate concentration

critical.title: Revenue Growing Strong — ₹2.42 Cr in 11 Months
critical.detail: Gross sales: ₹241.8L, Net sales: ₹182.4L. Feb '26 was the best month at ₹33.2L gross. But without COGS and shipping data, we cannot determine if this growth is profitable.
critical.action: Share COGS per product and FSHIP shipping data immediately to compute true margins.

critical.title: Discount Leakage: ₹49.7L (20.5% of Gross)
critical.detail: ₹49.7L given away in discounts. FIRST15 alone drove ₹19.9L in discounts across 2,124 orders. If ASP is ~₹6,240 and discount is ~₹1,280/order, that's a 20.5% top-line hit.
critical.action: Consider reducing FIRST15 from 15% to 10%, or cap it at ₹500. Test impact on conversion.

critical.title: COD Exposure at 45.9% — High RTO Risk
critical.detail: 31.6% pure COD + 14.3% partial COD. Without shipping data, we can't quantify RTO losses, but industry benchmarks suggest 15-25% RTO on COD orders.
critical.action: Share FSHIP data to quantify actual RTO rates and costs. Consider restricting COD above ₹5,000.

warnings.title: Order Export Coverage Gap
warnings.detail: Only Jul-Sep 2025 order exports received (700 orders out of 3,879). Missing Apr-Jun 2025 and Oct 2025 - Feb 2026. Payment method, customer, and geography analysis is based on partial data.
warnings.action: Export remaining order batches from Shopify (order #1 to #2789 and beyond #3489).

warnings.title: Return Rate Increasing
warnings.detail: Returns total ₹9.7L (4.0% of gross). Oct-Dec saw higher returns (₹1.15L, ₹1.68L, ₹1.56L) — possibly festive-season impulse purchases returned.
warnings.action: Analyze return reasons. Check if specific products or sizes drive returns.

warnings.title: Conversion Rate Flat at 1.13%
warnings.detail: 3,879 orders from 343,000 sessions = 1.13% conversion. This is typical for D2C apparel but leaves significant room for improvement.
warnings.action: A/B test landing pages, checkout flow, and trust signals. Gokwik PPCOD may be helping — track its conversion uplift.

warnings.title: No Marketing Attribution Data
warnings.detail: We have FY24-25 Meta Ads spend (₹3.8L) but no FY25-26 ad data. Cannot calculate ROAS, CPA, or true CAC.
warnings.action: Share Meta Ads export for Apr 2025 – Feb 2026 to compute marketing efficiency.

opportunities.title: Feb 2026 Breakout Month
opportunities.detail: 488 orders, ₹33.2L gross, ₹25.3L total — strongest month by far. Sessions also peaked at 38.5K. Identify what drove this (campaigns? seasonal?).
opportunities.action: Replicate Feb strategy. Check if specific campaigns or discounts drove the spike.

opportunities.title: Premium ASP: ₹3,942 Net Per Order
opportunities.detail: After discounts, average net revenue per order is ₹3,942. This is strong for D2C apparel and indicates brand premium is holding.
opportunities.action: Protect ASP — avoid deep discounting beyond first-order incentive.

cogs.note: COGS per category to be provided by client

order_export_coverage: Jul 2025 – Dec 2025 (1,950 unique orders from 39 export files)
